final:
// // This is a synchronous down counter
module counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [2:0] count);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 3'b000;
    end else begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This is a synchronous down counter
